jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Khadim's
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Khadim's! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Khadim's:
Khadim's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's!
